title: elaeocarpus submonoceras subsp. lasionyx

benefits: Elaeocarpus submonoceras subsp. lasionyx has many benefits, such as its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, pain relief, and even skin conditions like eczema and acne.
